title: Product owner can run the customer AI demo from one page
given: The tenant has AMP1-AMP11 assistant telemetry, action queue work, evidence records, playbooks, governed automation policies, API Hub review items, Twin insights, and admin controls.
then: The page shows one operating score and status derived from live assistant metrics.
The customer demo runbook has ordered links into chat, work engine, evidence quality, governed automation, admin, API Hub/Twin story, and operating-system closeout.
Each step includes a concise talk track based on current tenant metrics.

title: Admin exports a board-ready assistant operating report
then: An AssistantOperatingReport row is created with status, score, summary, and reportJson.
An AssistantAuditEvent records the export and embeds the same report as evidence.
The report includes executive summary, demo script, metrics, and limitations.

title: Operating report states limits instead of overclaiming automation
given: Some action queue work, API Hub review items, or Twin insights remain open.
then: The score is reduced by pending work and open review items.
The report limitations state that high-impact mutations require human approval.
The UI still provides a customer-safe demo path and does not mutate operational records.
